a.text: 1. ⭐[197] - bearclaw - tiny static site generator w/ rss
2. ⭐[10] - eclaire - lightning-fast static site webserver with automatic HTTPS right out of the box!
3. ⭐[6] - git-gone - 😧 Purge a file from your Git history
4. ⭐[4] - release.sh - 🚀 A simple bash script for building Go projects for multiple platforms 💻💾
5. ⭐[3] - notes - A simple CLI note-taking tool for humans
6. ⭐[3] - starchart - github supporter grid generator
8. ⭐[3] - dropzone - Drag and crop image ->pasteable base64 data URI
9. ⭐[2] - rsa-helper - How to ollie with RSA
10. ⭐[2] - knockknock - simple http load tester for static sites
11. ⭐[2] - minatar - A minimal avatar generator for turning strings into embeddable base64-encoded images!
12. ⭐[2] - gofetch - light alternative to neofetch written for fun
13. ⭐[2] - onehit - Hit-counter as a Service
14. ⭐[2] - github-scoreboard - Generate a linkable SVG of your github scoreboard!
15. ⭐[2] - donuts-are-good - my github profile :D
16. ⭐[2] - webring - Webrings are a cool way that you and your friends can link your sites together and share visitors. Clicking the link takes you to the next site in the ring.
17. ⭐[2] - whitescale - a vscode theme to burn out your retinas.
18. ⭐[1] - blog-elements - bearclaw plugin for the bearclaw blog
19. ⭐[1] - wolfrss.sh - terminal rss reader for my friend wolf
20. ⭐[0] - manyverse - A social network off the grid (real repo at https://gitlab.com/staltz/manyverse)
